items.title: Here's What Lifted Oracle (ORCL) in Q3
items.content: Oracle Corporation's strong Q3 performance was driven by its rapidly expanding cloud business and a significant increase in its order backlog. The company secured multi-billion dollar deals with major tech entities like OpenAI, xAI, Meta, Nvidia, and AMD, leading to an almost four-fold increase in its backlog over the past year. Despite the fund's overall underperformance compared to the Russell 1000 due to its focus on lower-risk, high-quality factors, Oracle's contribution was a highlight.

items.title: Defiance’s XMAG ETF, the First ETF Offering Exposure to the S&P 500 Excluding the “Magnificent Seven,” Surpasses $100 Million in AUM
items.content: Defiance ETFs announced that its Defiance Large Cap Ex-Magnificent Seven ETF (XMAG) has surpassed $100 million in assets under management since its launch in October 2024. XMAG offers investors exposure to the S&P 500 while explicitly excluding the "Magnificent Seven" tech giants, addressing concerns about market concentration. This milestone highlights strong investor demand for diversified large-cap equity strategies that avoid overexposure to a small group of mega-cap stocks.

items.title: Neumann Advisory Cuts Loose Pony AI Shares Worth $23.2 Million, According to Recent SEC Filing
items.content: Neumann Advisory Hong Kong Ltd has sold its entire stake of 1,031,880 shares in Pony AI Inc., valued at an estimated $23.21 million. This transaction, detailed in a recent SEC filing, means the fund no longer holds any position in the autonomous driving company. Pony AI, which went public in November 2024, remains a speculative investment with modest revenue and significant losses, appealing primarily to aggressive growth investors.

items.title: Exploring Analyst Estimates for JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) Q4 Earnings, Beyond Revenue and EPS
items.content: Analysts expect JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) to report Q4 earnings of $5.01 per share on $45.71 billion in revenue, representing year-over-year increases. Beyond the headline figures, analysts are forecasting growth in key metrics like "Consumer & Community Banking - Revenue By Business - Card Services & Auto" and "Fixed Income Markets." The stock has seen a 5.4% increase in the past month and holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

items.title: The Truth About Alphabet Inc. (Class A): Is This Stock Still a No-Brainer or Totally Overhyped?
items.content: This article examines whether Alphabet Inc. (Class A) is still a worthwhile investment, considering the hype around big tech and AI. It analyzes the company's strong product grip in search, YouTube, and Android, its position in the AI war, and its price-performance relative to rivals. The author concludes that Alphabet is a foundational long-term investment rather than a short-term hype stock.

items.title: Constellation Closes Deal for Calpine, Creating Biggest Electricity Generator
items.content: Constellation Energy has finalized its acquisition of Calpine, making it the largest owner of power plants in the U.S. This strategic move is a response to the anticipated increase in American electricity demand, fueled by the growth of data centers, electric vehicles, and domestic manufacturing.
